7.reason: [Error: The loop iterates up to 1000000 regardless of the actual string length, causing out-of-bounds access when i reaches the end of the string. Should use strlen(st) as the loop condition.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.25 , reason:  Error: The loop condition i<1000000 will iterate beyond the string length, causing out-of-bounds access when checking st[i+1] and st[i-1] near the end. Should use i<strlen(st) or check for null terminator.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: The loop iterates up to 1000000 regardless of the actual string length, causing out-of-bounds access when i reaches the end of the string. Should use strlen(st) as the loop condition.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  Error: Loop should stop at end of string (e.g., i < strlen(st)) to avoid out-of-bounds access when i=0 and printing null characters beyond input.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Loop does not terminate at end of string; continues to 1000000, causing out-of-bounds access and printing garbage. Should use for(i=0;st[i]!='\0';i++)]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Iterates over fixed large size instead of string length, causing out-of-bounds access and printing null characters
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Loop condition iterates beyond the string's null terminator, causing out-of-bounds memory access and printing garbage; should be st[i]!='\0' or i<strlen(st).

12.reason: Error: When i=0, st[i-1] accesses st[-1], which is out of bounds. Also, when i is at the last character, st[i+1] accesses beyond the string. Need to check boundaries.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.25 , reason:  Error: When i=0, st[i-1] accesses st[-1], which is out of bounds. Also, when i is at the last character, st[i+1] accesses beyond the string. Need to check boundaries.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  [No bounds check for st[i-1] when i==0 and st[i+1] when i is near end; also, when expansion conditions are not met, the '-' character is not printed (missing else case).]
